dashboard.label: PhishNet AI — Command Center
dashboard.description: Autonomous phishing triage overview. The agent investigates every alert; analysts review only what's flagged.

search.query: | inputlookup phishnet_decisions | stats count AS c | eval status=if(c>0, "MONITORING", "IDLE") | fields status
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | stats count AS total, count(eval(status="confirmed" AND recommended_action="close")) AS auto | eval rate=if(total>0, round(auto/total*100,0), 0) | fields rate
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | where status="confirmed" AND recommended_action="close" | stats count
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | where recommended_action="review" OR recommended_action="escalate" | stats count
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | where verdict="targeted_attack" | stats count
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | stats count by verdict | sort - count

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | where status="confirmed" AND recommended_action="close" | stats count AS fp | eval minutes_saved = fp*25 | eval hours_saved = round(minutes_saved/60,1) | fields hours_saved

panel.title: Review Queue — Flagged Alerts (click a row to investigate)

search.query: | inputlookup phishnet_decisions | where recommended_action!="close" | eval decision_state=if(analyst_override=="true" OR analyst_override==1, "overridden", if(status=="confirmed", "auto-applied", "awaiting approval")) | eval why_flagged=case(creds_submitted>0, "Credentials submitted after click", payload_executed=="true" OR payload_executed==1, "Payload executed on endpoint", verdict=="targeted_attack", "Targeted-attack indicators (new domain + click)", users_clicked>0, "User clicked the malicious link", verdict=="phishing", "Phishing indicators: sender/URL reputation", true(), "Flagged for analyst review") | table alert_id, verdict, confidence, why_flagged, recommended_action, decision_state, reasoning | sort - confidence

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$sel_alert$" | head 1 | eval steps_text=if(isnull(steps_text) OR steps_text="", "neutral\tno_data\t-\tNo investigation steps recorded for this alert.", steps_text) | makemv delim=" || " steps_text | mvexpand steps_text | rex field=steps_text "^(?<signal>[^\t]+)\t(?<check>[^\t]+)\t(?<tool>[^\t]+)\t(?<finding>.+)$" | streamstats count AS step | eval signal=upper(signal) | rename step AS "#", signal AS "Signal", check AS "Check", tool AS "Tool / Source", finding AS "Finding" | table "#", "Signal", "Check", "Tool / Source", "Finding"

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$sel_alert$" | head 1 | eval confidence=round(confidence*100, 0) . "%" | rename verdict AS "Verdict", confidence AS "Confidence", recommended_action AS "Recommended Action", reasoning AS "Reasoning" | table "Verdict", "Confidence", "Recommended Action", "Reasoning"

div.p: Security + observability fusion: did the payload execute on the endpoint?

search.query: | inputlookup phishnet_decisions | stats count AS processed, count(eval(status="confirmed" AND recommended_action="close")) AS auto_closed, count(eval(verdict="targeted_attack")) AS real_threats, count(eval(recommended_action!="close" AND NOT (analyst_override=="true" OR analyst_override==1) AND status!="confirmed")) AS handed_off | eval hours_saved=round(auto_closed*25/60,1) | rename processed AS "Alerts Processed", auto_closed AS "Auto-Closed (FP)", real_threats AS "Real Threats Caught", hours_saved AS "Analyst Hours Saved", handed_off AS "Awaiting Handoff" | table "Alerts Processed", "Auto-Closed (FP)", "Real Threats Caught", "Analyst Hours Saved", "Awaiting Handoff"

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | stats count AS processed, count(eval(status="confirmed" AND recommended_action="close")) AS auto_closed, count(eval(verdict="targeted_attack")) AS real_threats, count(eval(recommended_action!="close" AND NOT (analyst_override=="true" OR analyst_override==1) AND status!="confirmed")) AS handed_off, count(eval(payload_executed="true" OR payload_executed=1 OR payload_executed=true OR payload_executed="True")) AS payload_executed | eval report_timestamp=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC"), hours_saved=round(auto_closed*25/60, 1) | eval summary_lines=mvappend( "Executive Summary#Report Generated#".report_timestamp, "Executive Summary#Platform#PhishNet AI — Autonomous Phishing Triage", "Executive Summary#Alerts Processed#".processed, "Executive Summary#Auto-Closed (False Positive)#".auto_closed, "Executive Summary#Targeted Attacks Identified#".real_threats, "Executive Summary#Confirmed Payload Execution#".payload_executed, "Executive Summary#Estimated Analyst Hours Saved#".hours_saved, "Executive Summary#Open Cases — Next Shift#".handed_off, "Handoff Notes#Agent Disposition#All queue alerts investigated; full reasoning chain stored in phishnet_decisions.", "Handoff Notes#Required Analyst Actions#Review Priority Review Queue items; confirm, override, or escalate per IR playbook.", "Handoff Notes#Endpoint Impact#Any Payload Executed = Yes requires immediate containment verification." ) | mvexpand summary_lines | eval section=mvindex(split(summary_lines, "#"), 0), metric=mvindex(split(summary_lines, "#"), 1), value=mvindex(split(summary_lines, "#"), 2), alert_id="", verdict="", confidence="", subject="", recommended_action="", payload_executed_flag="", affected_host="" | fields report_timestamp section metric value alert_id verdict confidence subject recommended_action payload_executed_flag affected_host | append [ | inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search verdict="targeted_attack" OR payload_executed="true" OR payload_executed=1 OR payload_executed=true OR payload_executed="True" | sort - confidence | eval report_timestamp=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC"), section="Priority Review Queue", metric="Investigation Required", value=alert_id, confidence=round(confidence*100)."%", payload_executed_flag=if(payload_executed="true" OR payload_executed=1 OR payload_executed=true OR payload_executed="True", "Yes", "No") | table report_timestamp section metric value alert_id verdict confidence subject recommended_action payload_executed_flag affected_host ] | sort section value alert_id | rename report_timestamp AS "Report Timestamp", section AS "Section", metric AS "Field", value AS "Value", alert_id AS "Alert ID", verdict AS "Verdict", confidence AS "Confidence", subject AS "Subject", recommended_action AS "Recommended Action", payload_executed_flag AS "Payload Executed", affected_host AS "Affected Host"

| inputlookup phishnet_audit_log | eval _t=strptime(ts, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort - _t | eval Time=strftime(_t, "%H:%M:%S") | rename action AS "Action", alert_id AS "Alert", analyst AS "Analyst", detail AS "Detail" | table "Time", "Action", "Alert", "Analyst", "Detail"
